title: Deep Cognition at WESCCON 2025
summary: “The human is in charge; AI is the assist.” This quote from John Pennypacker, Senior Vice President at Deep Cognition, perfectly captures Deep Cognition’s vision for the future of customs automation and brokerage.  For years, “WESCCON” has been the premier hub for customs brokers and freight forwarders across the Pacific Coast, drawing industry leaders to […]
author: Anusha Sudhakaran
